intro: The following areas represent key research gaps identified in recent studies.

gaps.title: Identification and classification
gaps.description: There are no records of a smart solution for coconut pest and disease identification and classification in Sri Lanka. Symptoms of coconut disorders often show similar visual characteristics, making accurate differentiation difficult.

gaps.title: Severity assessment
gaps.description: Smart solutions for identifying some coconut pests and diseases have been reported in India, but assessment of disease severity and pest progression level is still limited.

gaps.title: Information sharing
gaps.description: A real-time communication system to speed up information exchange between coconut growers, extension personnel, and researchers has been identified as a priority need for effective pest and disease control.
